chunks.title: The Covenant Ratification Ceremony
chunks.reason: Describes the complete ritual of blood sprinkling and verbal agreement establishing the covenant.

chunks.title: The Elders See God
chunks.reason: Records the specific vision of the nobles seeing God and eating in His presence.

chunks.title: Moses Called to the Mountain
chunks.reason: Contains Yahweh's command and Moses' instructions to the elders before ascending.

chunks.title: Moses Enters the Cloud
chunks.reason: Narrates the cloud covering the mountain and Moses entering for forty days.
